title: Compact View 1.1
excerpt: Compact View 1.1 improves performance, adds new protections, and expands cross-browser support.
body:
Compact View 1.1 focuses on performance, stability, and usability. This update continues refining the one-at-a-time friend system while reducing API load.

We also expanded support to Firefox and improved background processing to make removals more reliable.

added: Improved spam protection for pin/unfriend actions
fixed: Unfriend actions failing after popup reopen
